Author: AEBus
Name: FFXIV Venues Directory
Description: Discover open FFXIV venues by region, data center, world, tags, and schedule. View detailed venue cards with addresses, banners, and external links directly in-game.
Punchline: Browse FFXIV roleplay venues in-game with rich filters and schedules.
Changelog:
Updated for the latest Dalamud release.

- Keeps the venue directory working with the current game/plugin environment.
- Banners now show a simple loading message while images load.
- Improved reliability when opening, closing, and refreshing the directory.
- General browsing polish for venue lists, details, filters, and schedules.
